basic_details.job_title: IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu) has officially announced the Research Associate/ Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years for the Research Associate post and up to 30 years for the Research Assistant post, holding a Graduate or Post Graduate degree in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, or allied disciplines with a minimum of 60% marks, can submit their online applications until 25 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Research Associate, Max: 30 years for Research Assistant.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Research Associate is 35 years. Maximum age limit for Research Assistant is 30 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines, Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines
qualification.details: Research Associate (project staff): Post Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines. Doctoral candidates will be preferred. Research Assistant (project staff): Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines. Postgraduate candidates will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Research Associate (project staff): ₹50,000 per month (Consolidated) Research Assistant (project staff): ₹30,000 per month (Consolidated)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIM Jammu Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_management_jammu_iim: Post Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines, Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines
Max: 35 years for Research Associate, Max: 30 years for Research Assistant.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Jammu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate (project staff): Post Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines. Doctoral candidates will be preferred. Research Assistant (project staff): Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines. Postgraduate candidates will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Research Associate is 35 years. Maximum age limit for Research Assistant is 30 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate (project staff): ₹50,000 per month (Consolidated) Research Assistant (project staff): ₹30,000 per month (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Jammu recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Research Associate and Research Assistant posts at IIM Jammu is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Research Associate, a Post Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in Economics, Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences or allied disciplines is required. For Research Assistant, a Graduate degree (minimum 60%) in similar fields is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate and Research Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years, and for the Research Assistant position, it is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Research Associate is ₹50,000 per month, and for Research Assistant, it is ₹30,000 per month. Both are consolidated monthly payments.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IIM Jammu for the posts of Research Associate and Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for IIM Jammu recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for the Research Associate and Research Assistant positions through the official website of IIM Jammu.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions at the Indian Institute of Management Jammu.

faq.question: Q9. Are doctoral candidates preferred for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, doctoral candidates will be preferred for the Research Associate (project staff) position, in addition to the required Post Graduate degree.

faq.question: Q10. When is the joining date for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The joining date for the selected candidates for these positions at IIM Jammu is scheduled for 01 August 2026.
